sampleChanges.from: The Executioner (displayed in game as the Invader due to a title bug) is a Legendary Hyperion sniper rifle from the base game. It uses a 15-round magazine and favors high fire rate and recoil reduction over per-shot damage. When scoped, it fires tight 5-round bursts that can land multiple critical hits, but its ammo consumption is heavy and benefits from ammo regeneration.
sampleChanges.to: The Executioner (displayed in game as the Invader due to a title bug) is a Legendary Hyperion sniper rifle from the base game. It uses a 15-round magazine and favours high fire rate and recoil reduction over per-shot damage. When scoped, it fires tight 5-round bursts that can land multiple critical hits, but its ammo consumption is heavy and benefits from ammo regeneration.

sampleChanges.from: The Chopper is an Epic Vladof assault rifle from The Secret Armory of General Knoxx that fires nonstop once triggered, emptying the magazine unless interrupted by reload, melee, or weapon swap. It hits hard but burns ammo quickly and has low accuracy, so it favors close-to-mid range and ammo regeneration.
sampleChanges.to: The Chopper is an Epic Vladof assault rifle from The Secret Armory of General Knoxx that fires nonstop once triggered, emptying the magazine unless interrupted by reload, melee, or weapon swap. It hits hard but burns ammo quickly and has low accuracy, so it favours close-to-mid range and ammo regeneration.
